title: LOOKING FOR TEAMATE
content: HELLO, I AM LOOKING FOR TEAMATE PLZ CONNECT WITH ME IF SOMEONE IS INTERESTED

comments.content: Hi Khushi, I'm interested in teaming up. I'm an AI Engineer specializing in Transformer Encoders for time-series modeling and architecture optimization. I can build and fine-tune the core model pipeline. Since I focus entirely on architecture and logic, I'm looking for a partner who can manage the heavy infrastructure/training runs on their end. Let me know if you want to collaborate!
